> **Status: FREEZABLE BASELINE (partial).** This spec freezes the exact-process portion of inc-08a that the ratified decisions cleared with no owner gate. Six gates (below) hold the remaining items frozen:false. Build the frozen:true ACs now; the gated ACs unfreeze as their owner/HDE/ADR sign-offs land. See [03-DECISIONS-RATIFIED.md](03-DECISIONS-RATIFIED.md) for the decision authority and [01-RECONCILIATION-AND-SCOPE.md](01-RECONCILIATION-AND-SCOPE.md) for the legacy ground truth.

# Inc-08a Build Spec ‚Äî Pharmacy Dispensing + Stock Core

**Charter:** "modern design, exact process". This is the **EXACT-PROCESS baseline**. Every frozen acceptance criterion reproduces verified legacy behaviour **verbatim**, anchored to a legacy `file:line` cite. The target stack (Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.3 / Spring Modulith / PostgreSQL 16) is adopted, and the only permitted deltas are (a) the pre-approved `double ‚Üí BigDecimal` data-type change (NUMERIC(19,6) / NUMERIC(19,2)) and (b) explicitly-labelled net-new hardening. **No business rule, pricing formula, numbering format, state machine, or report output is invented, guessed, or silently improved.** Every tempting modern improvement is parked behind a named Change Request.

**Authority order:** `03-DECISIONS-RATIFIED.md` (ratified register) > `01-RECONCILIATION-AND-SCOPE.md` (ground-truth legacy model) > `00-discovery-raw.json` (lane extracts with cites). The original `08-pharmacy-inventory-procurement.md` planning doc is **DRIFTED** and is NOT a build authority ‚Äî build only what the ratified decisions confirm.

---

## 1. Scope ‚Äî what freezes now vs. what is BLOCKED

### 1.1 Freezes now (this document, 08a)
- **Prerequisite seam:** the new `clinical::api` published prescription **read + dispense port** (three published interfaces, package-private impls; new allowed Modulith edge `pharmacy ‚Üí clinical::api`; no cycle).
- **Clinical prescription dispense:** NOT-GIVEN ‚Üí GIVEN transition, four in-order legacy guards, `issuePharmacy` stamp, hard negative-stock gate, aggregate `PharmacyMedicine.stock` decrement, append-only `PharmacyStockCard`/`stock_movement` OUT row, in-memory FEFO batch consumption (legacy null-expiry **EXCLUSION** + id-ASC tiebreak), `PrescriptionBatch` lot-trace rows.
- **OTC `PharmacySaleOrder` lifecycle:** PENDING ‚Üí APPROVED ‚Üí ARCHIVED (+ PENDING ‚Üí CANCELED), two independent detail status fields (fulfilment + payStatus), flat `Medicine.price √ó qty` cash pricing, `paymentType=CASH` literal, GENERAL dummy-patient billing anchor, 24h auto-cancel / auto-archive sweeps, OTC dispense with **no** batch decrement (deductBatch commented out in legacy).
- **Stock model + schema V39:** `pharmacy_medicine` (scalar aggregate balance), `stock_batch` (per-lot FEFO inventory), `stock_movement` (append-only stock-card ledger) ‚Äî a ratified modern re-model (**D16-CORRECTED**) of the legacy single-ledger + scalar-stock structure.
- **RBAC + pharmacyUid scoping:** coarse-verbatim `@PreAuthorize` mapping reusing **only the 35 seeded privilege codes** (inc-08 adds zero), deny-by-default `authenticated()` floor (net-new ADR-0006 hardening, labelled), and the required/server-validated `pharmacyUid` stock-source selector with **no** affiliation check.

### 1.2 BLOCKED (frozen:false) ‚Äî by which gate
| BLOCKED item | Gate | Baseline behaviour until gate clears |
|---|---|---|
| Stock decrement **pessimistic lock** + `@Version`/409 STALE_ENTITY split (Q4) | **CR-08-Q4 + ADR-0017 ratification** | Only inherited `@Version` from `AuditableEntity`; NO `SELECT FOR UPDATE`, NO lock column, NO STALE_ENTITY in the 08a ErrorCode set. |
| FEFO **NULLS-LAST** lot-selection (Q8) | **HDE sign-off + ADR-0017 ¬ß2** | Reproduce legacy null-expiry **EXCLUSION**; id-ASC tiebreak pinned. The "which lot dispenses" parity oracle cannot freeze. |
| As-built inc-05 worklist **show-all contradiction** | **BA + engagement-lead reconciliation** | Published `PrescriptionWorklistPort` is specified to the **legacy FILTER**; the inc-05 `pharmacyWorklist()`/repository finder/javadoc must be reconciled (correct the comment) OR show-all raised as an explicit CR before freeze. |
| OTC number **PK‚Üísequence suffix** provenance (Q9) | **CR-09-NUM1 (ADR-0014-forced)** | Format strings `PSO/{n}`, `PCST{n}`, `PCST/{year}/{n}` are declared verbatim; the sequence-backed (`seq_pso_no`/`seq_pcst_no`) variant cannot freeze and the raw-PK suffix is forbidden by ADR-0014 ¬ß1. |
| `stock_movement` **immutability / role-grant** enforcement mechanism | **security-architect PHI/audit classification** | DDL is append-only by application contract (no UPDATE/DELETE repository surface); the precise immutability/grant mechanism is implemented to security-architect spec, not self-authored here. |

**Q1 dispense-gate** is `OWNER_RELEASE_GATE` but **filter-only is the clean default** and does NOT hard-block this freeze: acceptance criteria state filter-only, the parity harness must NOT assert a terminal rejection, and `BillingQueries.getBillStatus` is **forbidden** at the dispense terminal. If a hard gate is ever elected it is **only** via `SettlementPolicy.requireSettled()` on the local `settled` flag.

### 1.3 Root freeze gate
Per `03-DECISIONS-RATIFIED.md:32`, **`readyToFreezeBuildSpec = NO`** until: (1) **ADR-0017 ratified** (root gate ‚Äî unblocks Q4 lock + Q8 mechanism; engagement-lead reconciles ADR-0006/0008/0009/0014/0020 status headers); (2) **Q8 HDE NULLS-LAST** call lands; (3) **CR-09-NUM1** approved (Q9). Q1 freezes as filter-only by default (does not hard-block). The freezable slices in ¬ß3‚Äì¬ß5 (everything not depending on those four gates) are **ready to freeze on their own merits** the moment the prerequisite seam (¬ß2) is built and the BA worklist reconciliation closes.

## 2. Prerequisite ‚Äî clinical::api published prescription read + dispense port

### 2.1 Q11 prerequisite (already complete)
`shared.documentnumber.DocumentNumberService` + `DocumentType` are **already promoted** to the shared kernel (`@ApplicationModule(OPEN)`, generic `nextval(:seqName)` keyed off an enum allow-list). No `pharmacy ‚Üí billing` edge for numbering. **08a core issues no new document types** ‚Äî `PSO`/`PCST` constants and their sequences are added only when CR-09-NUM1 is approved (see ¬ß4).

### 2.2 The published seam (hard prerequisite, architecture task BEFORE 08a code)
`PrescriptionPort` is today intra-module in `clinical.application` (controller-only consumer ‚Äî `PrescriptionPort.java:11-21`); the `pharmacy` module cannot legally depend on it. Publish **three** uid-keyed interfaces in `com.otapp.hmis.clinical.api` (which already carries `@NamedInterface("api")` ‚Äî `clinical/api/package-info.java:11`), all returning published DTO records (no entity, no internal `id` ‚Äî ADR-0014 ¬ß1), implementations package-private in `clinical.application` (mirroring `ConsultationLookupImpl` ‚Äî `ConsultationLookup.java:16`):

1. **`PrescriptionReadPort`** ‚Äî `PrescriptionView getByUid(String)`; `List<PrescriptionBatchView> listBatches(String)`.
2. **`PrescriptionWorklistPort`** ‚Äî `List<PrescriptionView> dispenseWorklist(WorklistFilter)`. **THE FILTER**, applied server-side in clinical.
3. **`PrescriptionDispensePort`** ‚Äî `PrescriptionView markDispensed(String, DispenseConfirmation, TxAuditContext)`. The decrement seam: pharmacy performs its OWN stock decrement / FEFO / stock-card write, then calls back to flip NOT-GIVEN ‚Üí GIVEN and stamp `approved_*` + `issue_pharmacy_uid`. Propagation **REQUIRED** (caller's tx), NO `@Async`, NO `REQUIRES_NEW` ‚Äî atomic with the pharmacy decrement (mirrors `BillingCommands.recordClinicalCharge` ‚Äî `BillingCommands.java:8-21`).

**Direction / no cycle.** The command edge inverts relative to billing: pharmacy ORCHESTRATES the dispense (it owns the `pharmacyUid`-selected stock source, Q2) and calls **down into `clinical::api`**. Add the single allowed edge `pharmacy ‚Üí clinical::api`. There is **no `clinical ‚Üí pharmacy` edge**, no reverse callback, no event from clinical to pharmacy. `ApplicationModules.verify()` stays green.

**Published DTOs (no entity leak):** `PrescriptionView` (mirror of `PrescriptionDto.java:18-81` minus `id`), `PrescriptionBatchView` (mirror of `PrescriptionBatchDto.java:14-25`), `WorklistFilter` (published `patientType` enum OUTPATIENT/OUTSIDER/INPATIENT ‚Äî NOT the leaked domain status), `DispenseConfirmation` (mirror of `IssueRequest.java:20-35` with `issuePharmacyUid` **required** ‚Äî pharmacy has already resolved/validated it, Q2).

### 2.3 THE reconciliation flag (must go to BA ‚Äî load-bearing) ‚Äî BLOCKED
The as-built inc-05 code **deliberately drops** the settled/bill-status filter for the pharmacy worklist (`PrescriptionPort.java:124-131` javadoc; `PrescriptionRepository.java:132-143` "settled filter intentionally omitted"; `PrescriptionService.java:362-366` returns all NOT-GIVEN with no bill-status predicate). This **contradicts** ratified **Q1** and the verified legacy non-empty FILTER (`PatientResource.java:4347/4364/4381/4410`). It is an un-CR'd silent behaviour change sitting in inc-05 code; **inc-08a must NOT freeze on top of it.** The new `PrescriptionWorklistPort` is specified to the legacy filter and the parity oracle asserts the filter, not show-all ‚Äî but the worklist parity oracle (AC-RX-PRE-05) cannot freeze until BA rules: (a) correct the inc-05 comment/finder to the legacy filter (most likely), or (b) confirm an approved show-all CR. This is the inc-06 "hard gate vs filter" lesson (RECONCILIATION N13) applied again.

### 2.4 What this seam explicitly does NOT do
No hard dispense gate / `BillingQueries.getBillStatus` at `markDispensed` (Q1); no `pharmacyUid` affiliation check / `pharmacy_staff` table (Q2); no FEFO/NULLS-LAST/lock semantics (those are pharmacy-module concerns, BLOCKED Q4/Q8); no new prescription states (only NOT-GIVEN/GIVEN ‚Äî `PrescriptionStatus.java:23-26`; D1 8-state phantom rejected; D3 salesPharmacy phantom rejected).

## 3. Clinical Prescription Dispense (NOT-GIVEN ‚Üí GIVEN, stock decrement, FEFO lot-trace)

### 3.1 Overview
Closes the stock-decrement TODO deferred since inc-05/06 (`Prescription.java:534-537`; `PrescriptionPort.java:73`). The pharmacy-orchestrated dispense runs guards 1-4 inside `Prescription.issue()` (already built), then guard 5 (hard negative-stock gate) in the pharmacy service, then the aggregate decrement, the append-only stock-card OUT row, in-memory FEFO batch consumption, and `PrescriptionBatch` lot-trace rows ‚Äî finally calling `PrescriptionDispensePort.markDispensed` to flip clinical state.

**Guard execution order (legacy `PatientResource.java:3199-3293`, preserved):** (1) prescription exists else NOT_FOUND; (2) status==NOT-GIVEN else 422 "...not a pending prescription"; (3) issued > 0 AND **issued >= balance** else 422 "Invalid issue value"; (4) issued==qty (all-or-nothing) else 422 "You can only issue the prescribed qty"; (5) hard negative-stock gate `PharmacyMedicine.stock < qty` else 422 INSUFFICIENT_STOCK. Legacy persisted GIVEN before the stock check (`:3237` before `:3243`); under the `@Transactional` rollback boundary, reordering guard 5 to run before the clinical flip is **observable-equivalent** (rollback undoes both regardless of intra-tx ordering) and is therefore NOT a behaviour change ‚Äî implement as a code comment, not a logged CR.

**FEFO (verbatim legacy, `getEarlierBatch` `PatientResource.java:3338-3376`):** fetch all `stock_batch` rows with `remaining_qty > 0` for the (pharmacy, medicine) pair ‚Äî **unordered query, sort in memory**; if ANY batch has a non-null `expiry_date`, select earliest `expiry_date` and **silently EXCLUDE all null-expiry batches**; if NO batch has an expiry, fall back to lowest `id` (FIFO). NULLS-LAST is BLOCKED (Q8). The legacy `try/catch(Exception){}` empty-catch that silently swallowed batch shortfall (`:3296-3336`) is a confirmed defect; the baseline surfaces a batch shortfall (null from `getEarlierBatch`) as INSUFFICIENT_STOCK ‚Äî **labelled deliberate defect-correction, NOT a parity assertion** (does not change which lot or how much is consumed on the happy path).

**Pricing:** medicine charges route through `BillingCommands.recordClinicalCharge(kind=MEDICINE, serviceUid=medicineUid, ...)` at **prescribe time** (already implemented in `PrescriptionService`). The dispense step does NOT re-invoke billing.

**Worklist three-valued status (route to solution-architect):** AC-RX-DSP-17/18 filter on three-valued live `BillStatus` (PAID/COVERED; +VERIFIED for INPATIENT). The published `BillingQueries.getBillStatus` seam is reserved for `add_report` bill-gating only, and RECONCILIATION ¬ßC/D18 confirms a binary `settled` flag cannot represent the COVERED/VERIFIED distinction. The mechanism by which the worklist obtains three-valued status (likely a new `billing::api` worklist-status read projection, governed by ADR-0008 ¬ß6) must be settled with the solution-architect before AC-RX-DSP-17/18 are implemented. This is NOT a baseline-fidelity break (the legacy filter behaviour is correctly specified) ‚Äî it is an unresolved cross-module read mechanism.

## 4. OTC PharmacySaleOrder Lifecycle

### 4.1 Overview
Walk-in OTC `PharmacySaleOrder` lifecycle, migrated into the pharmacy module. Entities: `PharmacySaleOrder` (header) + `PharmacySaleOrderDetail` (lines) + `PharmacyCustomer` (walk-in record, **separate from clinical `Patient`**). Each line is billed via its own `PatientBill` against a **GENERAL dummy patient** (no='GENERAL'), NOT against the walk-in customer.

**Header state machine** (`PatientServiceImpl.java:3019-3026,3079,3138,3199,3217`): PENDING (initial) ‚Üí APPROVED (a **side effect** of the cashier paying the linked `PatientBill` via `confirm_bills_payment` ‚Äî `PatientBillResource.java:269-393`; no standalone approve endpoint; received via a cross-module settlement event) ‚Üí ARCHIVED (when all details GIVEN; also auto-archive after 24h). PENDING ‚Üí CANCELED (explicit cancel, guard status==PENDING; auto-cancel after 24h). ARCHIVED/CANCELED terminal.

**Detail two independent status fields** (`PatientServiceImpl.java:3395-3442`; `PharmacySaleOrderDetail.java:41-42`): fulfilment status NOT-GIVEN ‚Üí GIVEN; payStatus UNPAID ‚Üí PAID (bulk side effect of `confirm_bills_payment`).

**Dispense gate** (`give_medicine` `PatientResource.java:6230-6232`): hard-rejects if `order.status != APPROVED`; **never** re-checks payStatus at dispense. Payment enforcement is indirect (order only reaches APPROVED via the billing payment handler). OTC dispense (`PatientResource.java:6212-6322`): force issued=qty (all-or-nothing); set detail GIVEN; stamp `issuePharmacy` (NOT `salesPharmacy` ‚Äî dead field, `PharmacySaleOrderDetail.java:76`); hard negative-stock gate (`:6272-6273`); decrement `PharmacyMedicine.stock`; write stock-card OUT row reference="Issued in sale: id <detailId>". **`deductBatch` is COMMENTED OUT (`:6317`) ‚Äî NO batch decrement, NO lot-trace on OTC.**

**Pricing (Q9):** each detail's `PatientBill.amount = Medicine.price √ó qty` (flat cash, NUMERIC(19,2), HALF_UP per ADR-0009 ¬ß4); `paymentType` hardcoded literal `CASH` regardless of input (`PatientServiceImpl.java:3342`); no insurance plan / co-pay / discount. **OTC bills MUST be created with this flat-price/CASH math directly and MUST NOT pass through `BillingCommands.recordClinicalCharge`** ‚Äî that seam runs the cash-first/insurance-override pricing engine + PENDING-invoice accumulator (`BillingCommands.java:24-34`; `ChargeRequest` carries planUid/membershipNo) and would apply plan pricing/co-pay to OTC, violating Q9 and AC-OTC-02/AC-OTC-22. If a billing seam is needed for OTC it must be a **distinct flat-cash charge path** (escalate to solution-architect / legacy-analyst to define one) ‚Äî do NOT reuse `recordClinicalCharge`.

**GENERAL dummy patient** (`PatientServiceImpl.java:3259-3355`): ensured-or-created; the OTC `PatientBill` hangs off this dummy patient as a billing anchor.

**Numbering (Q9 / CR-09-NUM1 BLOCKED):** format strings verbatim ‚Äî `PSO/{id}`, `PCST{id}` (savePharmacySaleOrder), `PCST/{year}/{id}` (createPharmacyCustomer) ‚Äî but the raw-PK suffix violates ADR-0014 ¬ß1; the fix (back the suffix with `seq_pso_no`/`seq_pcst_no`, V39+) is **CR-09-NUM1** (owner approval pending). Until approved the format strings are declared but the sequence-backing AC is frozen:false.

**ADR-0010 reporting consequence:** because `paymentType` is hardcoded CASH, OTC revenue-by-payment-mode reports show all OTC under CASH until **CR-09-NUM2** (honour real payment mode) is approved.

## 5. Pharmacy Stock Model + Schema (V39)

### 5.1 Overview ‚Äî ratified modern re-model (D16-CORRECTED)
A modern re-model of the legacy single-ledger + scalar-stock structure, presented as an **acceptable re-model NOT reproduced structure**, proven by a parity test. Three tables in `V39__pharmacy_stock_core.sql` (migrations resume at **V39**; the `seq_*_no` doc sequences are already in V13 and are NOT touched):

1. **`pharmacy_medicine`** ‚Äî the **authoritative scalar aggregate** balance, 1:1 re-model of legacy `PharmacyMedicine.stock` (`PharmacyMedicine.java:38`), promoted to `stock NUMERIC(19,6)` (pre-approved double‚ÜíBigDecimal, ADR-0009 ¬ß3). **No separate `StockBalance` entity** (D6/D16 ‚Äî the plan's two-table split is rejected). This column IS the legacy aggregate; the ledger and batches do NOT derive it.
2. **`stock_batch`** ‚Äî per-lot FEFO inventory, re-model of `PharmacyMedicineBatch` (`PharmacyMedicineBatch.java:35-53`): `(pharmacy, medicine)` key, free-text `batch_no`, nullable `manufactured_date`/`expiry_date`. **CORRECTION flagged (net-new derived split, NOT a 1:1 legacy field):** legacy has a single in-place-decremented `qty`; this slice splits it into `received_qty` (immutable intake) + `remaining_qty` (the parity invariant: `remaining_qty` reproduces the legacy post-decrement `qty`).
3. **`stock_movement`** ‚Äî append-only stock-card ledger, re-model of `PharmacyStockCard` (`PharmacyStockCard.java:37-57`): `qty_in`/`qty_out`/`running_balance`, free-text `reference`, `occurred_at`. **`running_balance` is a STORED post-movement snapshot of `pharmacy_medicine.stock`, NOT recomputed.** A **net-new typed `movement_type` enum** maps 1:1 onto the legacy free-text reference strings so the stock-card report keeps parity (legacy has NO type column ‚Äî type was conveyed only by the reference string, which is still persisted verbatim).

**JPA:** all three entities extend `AuditableEntity` (hidden BIGINT id + CHAR(26) uid + `@Version` + audit cols). Cross-module references use loose `*_uid` columns with NO physical FK (`pharmacy_uid`/`medicine_uid` ‚Üí masterdata, a different module). `stock_batch ‚Üí pharmacy_medicine` is intra-module so it IS a real surrogate FK on `pharmacy_medicine.id` (no cascade ‚Äî legacy has none). No `coefficient` column in 08a stock-core (08b pharmacy‚Üîstore path only).

**Net-new deltas (explicitly labelled, NOT parity assertions):** the typed `movement_type` enum value-set; the `received_qty`/`remaining_qty` split; the inherited `@Version`; the `ck_pharmacy_medicine_stock_nonneg` DB CHECK (legacy is a plain unconstrained double ‚Äî the genuinely-frozen parity element is the **app-layer 422 INSUFFICIENT_STOCK reject**, with the CHECK as net-new DB backstop).

No StockBalance table. | `PharmacyMedicine.java:38,40-48` | D16-CORRECTED / D6 | YES |

## 6. RBAC + Pharmacy Scoping (@PreAuthorize mapping + pharmacyUid resolution)

### 6.1 Overview
Authorization for the 08a surface: `@PreAuthorize` mapping reusing **only the 35 seeded privilege codes** (26 live + 9 dead per `expected-privilege-codes.txt`), reproducing coarse legacy gating verbatim, plus the `pharmacyUid` resolution contract. Legacy authorization is method-level `@PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority(...)")` only, with deliberately uneven coverage.

**For the 08a surface specifically ‚Äî only two LIVE pharmacy gates exist:** `pharmacies/save ‚Üí ADMIN-ACCESS` (`PharmacyResource.java:122`); `update_stock ‚Üí MEDICINE_STOCK-UPDATE` (`:200`). **Scope fence:** the transfer/procurement codes (PHARMACY_ORDER-ALL, STORE_ORDER-ALL, GOODS_RECEIVED_NOTE-*, LOCAL_PURCHASE_ORDER-*) are live for **08b** and are already in `PrivilegeGateArchTest` LIVE_CODES ‚Äî "only two pharmacy gates" is an 08a statement, not a global inc-08 cap.

Clinical dispense (`issue_medicine` `PatientResource.java:3199`) and the entire OTC flow (`save_pharmacy_sale_order` `@PreAuthorize` COMMENTED OUT `PharmacyResource.java:298`; detail/cancel/archive/list/get unannotated) and reads were **UNGATED**. The "177" figure is the inc-06 phantom and is **BANNED** (Q5; D12) ‚Äî truth = 35 codes; inc-08 adds zero.

**As-built (do NOT rebuild):** deny-by-default is ALREADY ACTIVE (`SecurityConfig.java:126` `.anyRequest().authenticated()` ‚Äî the catch-all legacy commented out) = **ADR-0006 net-new hardening, NOT a parity assertion** (legacy returned anonymous success). Authorities map from the `privileges` JWT claim with empty prefix (`SecurityConfig.java:85-92`). `PrivilegeGateArchTest` fails the build on any code outside the 27 live codes. `PRESCRIPTION-ALL` is a **never-gated catalogue string** ‚Äî NOT in the seed, MUST NOT be authored.

**pharmacyUid (Q2 / ADR-0020):** the modern uid rename of the legacy client-supplied `pharmacy_name`/`pharmacy_id` param ‚Äî **REQUIRED, server-VALIDATED per-call**, used ONLY to select the stock source. Server rejects missing/unresolvable, but performs **NO affiliation check** ‚Äî no `pharmacy_staff` table, no Pharmacist‚ÜíPharmacy field, no pharmacy JWT claim, no 403 on mismatch. Affiliation gate = **CR-Q2** (parked).

### 6.2 Acceptance criteria ‚Äî RBAC + scoping

| # | Criterion | Legacy / authority cite | Decision | Frozen |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AC-RBAC-01 | The 08a clinical dispense endpoint carries NO role-level `@PreAuthorize`; protected ONLY by the global `authenticated()` floor. The parity harness MUST NOT assert 403-on-wrong-role (legacy ungated). Any valid JWT passes the authorization layer. | `PatientResource.java:3199` (no `@PreAuthorize`); discovery:98-99; `SecurityConfig.java:89` (commented) | Q5 | YES |
| AC-RBAC-02 | NO 08a OTC endpoint (save order, save detail, cancel, archive, archive_all, list, get) carries a role-level `@PreAuthorize` (legacy ungated); protected ONLY by the floor. Harness MUST NOT assert 403-on-wrong-role. | `PharmacyResource.java:298` (commented), `:297-345` (unannotated) | Q5 | YES |
| AC-RBAC-03 | The manual stock-update endpoint is gated EXACTLY `@PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('MEDICINE_STOCK-UPDATE')")` ‚Äî the single coarse live code, no other. Without it ‚Üí 403; with it ‚Üí succeeds. | `PharmacyResource.java:200`; `expected-privilege-codes.txt:14` | Q5 | YES |
| AC-RBAC-04 | Any 08a pharmacy-catalog WRITE endpoint mirroring `pharmacies/save` is gated EXACTLY `@PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('ADMIN-ACCESS')")`. **Scope note:** clarify with the architect whether this governs a NEW 08a endpoint or only asserts the existing masterdata gate (`PharmacyController.java:43,51`) so 08a does not re-author already-built pharmacy CRUD; the code (ADMIN-ACCESS) is correct either way. | `PharmacyResource.java:122`; `expected-privilege-codes.txt:1`; `PharmacyController.java:43,51` | Q5 | YES |
| AC-RBAC-05 | 08a read/worklist endpoints carry NO role-level `@PreAuthorize` (legacy reads ungated); protected ONLY by the floor. Worklist visibility is filtered by pharmacyUid param, NOT by a privilege gate (and is a FILTER, never a hard service gate ‚Äî Q1). | `PharmacyResource.java:143,165`; RECONCILIATION N13 | Q5 | YES |
| AC-RBAC-06 | `PrivilegeGateArchTest` passes: every cited code resolves to one of the 26/27 live codes; only 'ADMIN-ACCESS' and 'MEDICINE_STOCK-UPDATE' appear as 08a in-scope gates; NO new code introduced; 'PRESCRIPTION-ALL' MUST NOT appear in any `@PreAuthorize`. | `expected-privilege-codes.txt:1-35`; `PrivilegeGateArchTest.java:35-64`; 02-decisions-raw Q5 | Q5 | YES |

| AC-RBAC-09 | With a resolvable pharmacyUid and a JWT carrying no pharmacy affiliation, the server performs NO user-to-pharmacy affiliation check and returns NO 403 on that basis. No `pharmacy_staff` table, no Pharmacist‚ÜíPharmacy field, no pharmacy JWT claim. | `Pharmacist.java:44-72`; `Pharmacy.java:34-54`; `CustomAuthenticationFilter.java:76-88`; discovery absences (00-discovery-raw.json:1398-1422) | Q2 | YES |
| AC-RBAC-10 | NO granular -VERIFY/-APPROVE/-SUBMIT/-REJECT privilege codes are authored for any 08a flow; coarse single-code gating preserved verbatim. SoD parked as CR-08-SoD, explicitly OUT of baseline. | `LocalPurchaseOrderResource.java:92-133` (single LOCAL_PURCHASE_ORDER-ALL); discovery absences (00-discovery-raw.json:1416-1418) | Q5 | YES |
| **AC-RBAC-11** | **OWNER-GATED (Q1)** ‚Äî the dispense terminal carries NO bill-status check and NO dispense-gate privilege code; if a hard gate is ever elected it is `SettlementPolicy.requireSettled()` on the local `settled` flag, NEVER `BillingQueries.getBillStatus`. Filter-only freezes by default; this BLOCKS only if a terminal rejection is asserted. | `PatientResource.java:3199-3293`; DECISIONS-RATIFIED Q1; ADR-0008 ¬ß6 Addendum (getBillStatus forbidden) | Q1 | **NO** |

## 9. Definition of Done ‚Äî freezable 08a slice

The freezable slice (¬ß2 prereq, ¬ß3 clinical dispense, ¬ß4 OTC, ¬ß5 stock model, ¬ß6 RBAC) is DONE when:

1. **Prerequisite seam built and green.** Three `clinical::api` interfaces published with package-private impls; `ApplicationModules.verify()` passes with the single allowed edge `pharmacy ‚Üí clinical::api` and no `clinical ‚Üí pharmacy` cycle. (AC-RX-PRE-01, AC-RX-DSP-01)
2. **BA worklist reconciliation closed** (AC-RX-PRE-05) ‚Äî the inc-05 `pharmacyWorklist()`/repository/javadoc corrected to the legacy FILTER, or its show-all raised and approved as an explicit CR. The worklist parity oracle asserts the legacy FILTER (PAID|COVERED; +VERIFIED for INPATIENT), never show-all.
3. **All frozen:true ACs pass**, each anchored to its legacy cite, with parity tests asserting verbatim guard messages (substring on "...not a pending prescription"; verbatim "Invalid issue value" / "You can only issue the prescribed qty"), the FEFO null-expiry EXCLUSION + id-ASC tiebreak, the stock-card reference strings, the OTC state machine and all-CASH pricing, and the GENERAL-dummy-patient billing anchor.
4. **No smuggled deviation.** Verified absent from the baseline: hard dispense gate / `BillingQueries.getBillStatus` at any terminal; pessimistic lock or STALE_ENTITY; NULLS-LAST as a frozen requirement; FEFO-on-OTC / OTC batch decrement; `pharmacy_staff` / affiliation 403; per-transition SoD codes; raw-PK number suffix; "177"; `PRESCRIPTION-ALL` in any `@PreAuthorize`. OTC billing uses a flat-cash path, NOT `recordClinicalCharge`.
5. **`PrivilegeGateArchTest` passes** with only ADMIN-ACCESS and MEDICINE_STOCK-UPDATE as 08a in-scope gates; zero new privilege codes; deny-by-default labelled net-new (owner-ack required, AC-RBAC-07).
6. **V39 applies clean** on a V1..V38 PostgreSQL 16 instance; additive-only; all quantity/money columns NUMERIC(19,6); `ErrorCode.INSUFFICIENT_STOCK` added.
7. **Testcontainers integration green** for the full clinical-dispense path (AC-RX-DSP-23) and the full OTC lifecycle + auto-sweeps (AC-OTC-28/29).
8. **Net-new audit trail** writes append-only `AuditLog` rows via `AuditRecorder` (no Envers, no PHI in payload) for dispense and every OTC transition (AC-RX-DSP-21, AC-OTC-26).
9. **All five blocking gates resolved or the dependent ACs explicitly carried as frozen:false** with their gate named (¬ß7). The four root gates (ADR-0017, Q8 HDE, CR-09-NUM1, BA reconciliation) and the security-architect immutability classification are tracked in the risk register with owners.
10. **Routed to solution-architect** (does not block this section's freeze but blocks implementation of AC-RX-DSP-17/18): the mechanism for obtaining three-valued bill status (PAID/COVERED/VERIFIED) for the worklist ‚Äî likely a new `billing::api` worklist-status read projection under ADR-0008 ¬ß6, NOT a binary `settled` flag and NOT `getBillStatus`.

**Freeze readiness:** ¬ß6 (RBAC), ¬ß5 (stock model ‚Äî except AC-STK-07/09/10), and the filter-only/no-gate ACs of ¬ß2/¬ß3/¬ß4 are independently freezable now. Whole-08a `readyToFreezeBuildSpec` flips to YES only when blockers 1 (ADR-0017), 2 (Q8 HDE), and 4 (CR-09-NUM1) clear and the BA worklist reconciliation closes; Q1 freezes filter-only by default.
